name: blog-post
description: Research, write, and optimize a blog post.

steps.instruction:
Research {topic} for an audience of {audience}.
Find at least 5 credible sources with specific data points.
steps.title: Research

steps.instruction: Turn the research into an outline: a hook, 3–5 sections, and a takeaway.
steps.title: Outline

steps.instruction:
Write the post from the outline, in a voice that fits {audience}.
Target roughly {word_count} words.
steps.title: Write

steps.instruction: Tighten the draft: cut filler, fix weak transitions, vary sentence length.
steps.title: Edit

steps.instruction: Add a title tag, meta description, and headings. Work {topic} in naturally.
steps.title: Seo Check
